title: Imperial Personal Archives
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial Personal Archives''' was an organization of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that collected and stored information of personal interest to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Its normal counterpart was the [[Imperial Database|Imperial database]]. It was overseen by the [[Steward of the Imperial Personal Archives]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{1st}}
